revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Transylvania | flag alias = Flag of Transylvania (Local).svg | flag alias-1350 = Flag of Transylvania (1350).svg | flag alias-1530 = Arms of Transylvania in Cod. icon. 391.svg | flag alias-1550 = TransilvaniaSigilium1550.png | flag alias-1596 = Coa Transylvania Country History v4.svg | flag alias-1601 = Transylvanian flag, 1601.svg | flag alias-1615 = Banner of Gabriel Bethlen.svg | flag alias-1703 = Francis II Rákóczi's Iustam Causam banner.svg | flag alias-1730 = Ioannes Szegedi's arms of Transylvania, 1734.svg | flag alias-1765 = Flag of Transylvania before 1918.svg | flag alias-1852 = Reported flag of Transylvania in 1852.svg | flag alias-1918 = Flag of Transylvania (1918–1919).jpg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1350 | var2 = 1530 | var3 = 1550 | var4 = 1596 | var5 = 1601 | var6 = 1615 | var7 = 1703 | var8 = 1730 | var9 = 1765 | var10 = 1852 | var11 = 1918 | related1 = Kingdom of Romania | related2 = Romania | redir1 = Principality of Transylvania </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Transylvania here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Transylvania for full history.
